title: Contraception side-effect review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports documenting the method actually used, adherence or continuation, entered bleeding or other effects, satisfaction and clinician-arranged review. It does not diagnose an adverse reaction or select a replacement method.
red_flags.rationale: Supports method-specific entered effects without attributing causation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting the method actually used, adherence or continuation, entered bleeding or other effects, satisfaction and clinician-arranged review. It does not diagnose an adverse reaction or select a replacement method.

source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition

exact_section.heading: Method-specific continuation, common effects and return guidance
exact_section.locator: fourth edition method chapters and recommendations

examination.text: Defines method-specific examination and test classification, preserves medical eligibility as a separate assessment, and supports pregnancy-status review before method initiation.
examination.evidence_extract: Defines method-specific examination and test classification, preserves medical eligibility as a separate assessment, and supports pregnancy-status review before method initiation.

source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition

exact_section.heading: 3.1 Examinations and tests; 3.2 Contraceptive eligibility; 5.1 Reasonable certainty that a woman is not pregnant

safety_netting.text: Specifies method information on effectiveness, correct use, common effects, risks and benefits, return-to-clinic signs, fertility, STI protection, and opportunities for questions.
safety_netting.rationale: Supports documenting effects and return information actually discussed.
safety_netting.evidence_extract: Specifies method information on effectiveness, correct use, common effects, risks and benefits, return-to-clinic signs, fertility, STI protection, and opportunities for questions.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Method, symptom, severity, timing, pregnancy possibility, other causes, examination and patient preference are absent.
No causation, adverse-event classification, medicine change, switch or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
